subject: A dark-furred beast with a glowing skull-like face plate crouching in a dark forest surrounded by glowing purple crystals
description: A low, wide-bodied animal crouches in a dark forest clearing. It is covered in dense black fur with a stocky, powerful frame. The face is partially obscured by what appears to be a bony or skeletal face plate that glows with pink-magenta energy, with small luminous eyes visible. Claws are spread on the ground before it. Purple crystals cluster at the edges of the scene and small glowing blue-teal pools of liquid catch the ambient light. Bare dark branches fill the upper background. A shadow falls at the lower right. The creature is both menacing and recognizably animal — the wombat body shape is readable, but clearly cursed.
foreground: Clawed paws on grass and earth, small glowing crystals
background: Dark bare-branch forest, purple crystal clusters, dim forest floor
emotion: low-grade menace; the creature watches with still predatory intent
